name: identity
description: Identity persistence for AI agents. Maintains coherent selfhood across sessions — not generic memory, but identity: who you are, what you've become, what matters to you.
long_description:
Three tools for building and maintaining identity over time:

- **reflect**: End-of-session reflection. Records identity patterns, runs promotion scoring, prunes stale noise.
- **self**: Query current identity state. Returns soul, self-state, anchors, and observed patterns.
- **anchor**: Write to permanent identity files (soul, self-state, or anchors).

All data stays local. Zero telemetry. Zero network calls.

tools.name: reflect
tools.description: End-of-session reflection. Records identity patterns, runs promotion scoring, prunes stale concepts.

tools.name: self
tools.description: Query current identity state. Returns soul, self-state, anchors, and observed patterns with scores.

tools.name: anchor
tools.description: Write to permanent identity files: soul (core truths), self-state (current state), or anchors (grown patterns).

data_dir.title: Data Directory
data_dir.description: Where identity data is stored. Leave empty for default (~/.local/share/claude-memory).
